arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti hints at changes to Real Madrid’s XI to face Man City
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has hinted that some altogether considerable alterations could be on the cards in his chosen line-up to face Manchester City on Wednesday. This comes…

arts.ttl: Guardiola tells Real to back off referees after Bellingham red card complaints
arts.sum: England international Bellingham was dismissed for foul language in Real’s weekend LaLiga draw at Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Injuries and inconsistency; Why Man City’s face-off with Real Madrid is their most demanding game yet
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s City trail 3-2 on aggregate after letting a lead slip away in the first leg at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola offers Jude Bellingham blunt advice after red card ahead Real Madrid Champions League clash
arts.sum: The Man City boss was not backing the Englishman after was sent off against Osasuna

arts.ttl: Referee Munuera being investigated for ‘conflict of interest’ after Jude Bellingham red card
arts.sum: An investigation into the extra-sporting activities of La Liga referee José Munuera has been kicked into gear by the RFEF. That’s according to Diario AS, who have on Tuesday provided…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Man City - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting Real Madrid's starting lineup for the second leg of their Champions League play-off against Man City.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Real Madrid - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting Manchester City's starting lineup for the second leg of their Champions League play-off against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Silva: City not in same 'dark place' but season hinges on Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Bernardo Silva believes Manchester City are not in the same "dark place" they were at the end of 2024 but admitted the situation is still "not perfect" with their season now hinging on their Champions League second-leg tie against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Man City need 'perfect game' - can Guardiola find miracle in Madrid?
arts.sum: Manchester City must pull off one of the greatest results in their European history at Real Madrid to stay in the Champions League, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.

arts.ttl: Pep hopes Grealish can 'get it' for City run-in
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola challenged Jack Grealish to prove he is more than just an FA Cup player by helping Manchester City keep their Champions League hopes alive against Real Madrid.
